title: Create Regions Unexplored Compat: Crushing
description: Crushing recipes for blocks from Regions Unexplored
body:
This mod adds balanced probabilistic crushing recipes for various types of stones, soils, nylium, and other blocks from Regions Unexplored. All recipes use Create's crushing mechanism and provide various resources with different drop chances.

Create already includes built-in compatibility recipes for Regions Unexplored:

Pressing: 4 recipes for dirt paths (peat and silt dirt paths from dirt and grass blocks)
Milling: Multiple recipes for various flowers (daisies, lupines, snowbelles, etc.)
Mixing: 2 recipes for mud (peat mud and silt mud)
Filling: 2 recipes for grass blocks (peat and silt grass blocks)
Cutting: 5 recipes for wood processing (brimwood, ashen, silver birch logs and wood)

Note: Create does not include any crushing recipes for Regions Unexplored blocks, which is why this mod exists.  

<details>
<summary>List of all crushing recipes (30 recipes)</summary>

## Stones and Minerals

- Clay Ball (30%)
- Gravel (28%)
- Flint (18%)
- Sand (15%)
- Raw Iron (3%)
- Raw Copper (2%)

### Chalk (160 ticks)
- White Dye (35%)
- Calcite (20%)
- Sand (25%)
- Bone Meal (12%)

### Pointed Redstone (160 ticks)
- Cobblestone (35%)
- Gravel (25%)
- Flint (20%)
- Raw Iron (5%)
- Raw Copper (4%)
